cantonese: 有D人好簡單好理所當然咁就拍到拖
mandarin_reference: 有些人很轻松、很理所当然地就谈上恋爱了
notes: 有D is informal spelling of 有啲; 拍拖=谈恋爱=in a relationship

cantonese: 買唔到飛嘅人能否觀看直播？
mandarin_reference: 买不到票的人能否观看直播？
notes: 飛 means ticket in colloquial Cantonese

cantonese: 兩位好識食，俾個like你哋
mandarin_reference: 你们两位真会吃，给你们点个赞
notes: like is English code-mixing; 識食 means knowing good food or being good at finding food.

cantonese: 多谢每一位撑粤语嘅人
mandarin_reference: 感谢每一位支持粤语的人
notes: 撐 means support; 嘅 is a Cantonese possessive/relative marker.

cantonese: 你地互寸好好笑呀
context: reacting to people teasing each other
mandarin_reference: 你们互相吐槽真的很好笑
notes: 你地 is an informal spelling of 你哋; 互寸 means teasing or mocking each other.

cantonese: 入機場嗰陣安檢預咗唔會太快
mandarin_reference: 进机场的时候就预料到安检不会太快
notes: 嗰陣 means at that time or when; 預咗 means expected or assumed in advance.

cantonese: 你覺得阿仙奴奪冠嘅功臣係邊個
mandarin_reference: 你觉得阿森纳夺冠的功臣是谁？
notes: 阿仙奴 is the Hong Kong Cantonese name for Arsenal; 係邊個 means who is it.

cantonese: 不如問下你自己係咪無update後續啲發展
mandarin_reference: 不如问下你自己是不是没有跟进后续的发展
notes: update is English code-mixing; 係咪 means whether or is it.; 啲=的/一些

cantonese: 香港民意黎架wo
mandarin_reference: 这是香港民意来的啊
notes: 黎架wo is an informal written form of a Cantonese sentence-final expression; wo adds emphasis or reminder tone.

cantonese: 有得白食白住仲有得打機
context: commenting on benefits or living situation
mandarin_reference: 可以白吃白住，还可以打游戏
notes: 有得=can have/get to; 白食白住=free food and housing; 打機=打游戏=play games

cantonese: 同佢同期個d 全部都老哂啦
context: commenting on people from the same period
mandarin_reference: 和他同期的那些人全都老了
notes: 個d is an informal spelling of 嗰啲; 晒 marks completion or totality.

cantonese: 佢chok 到全歐洲最靚數據
mandarin_reference: 他刷出了全欧洲最好看的数据
notes: chok is Hong Kong online slang; here it means to force/produce an impressive statistic

cantonese: 佢唔好彩既係佢遇到最頂級既射手
mandarin_reference: 他不走运的是，他遇到了最顶级的前锋
notes: 既 is an informal spelling of 嘅/的; 唔好彩 means unlucky.

cantonese: 得你一個日日開post吹捧
mandarin_reference: 只有你一个人天天发帖吹捧
notes: post is English code-mixing; 得你一個=只有你一个 means only you; 日日=天天 means everyday

cantonese: 佢都係一人carry住曼聯
mandarin_reference: 他也是一个人撑着曼联
notes: carry is English code-mixing, the sentence means he is supporting the team by himself.

cantonese: 亦都冇咁易畀人笑你chok口音
mandarin_reference: 也没那么容易被人笑你的刻意口音
notes: chok is Hong Kong online slang; 畀人笑 means being laughed at by others.

cantonese: 個個男人都會陪架啦
mandarin_reference: 每个男人都会陪的啦
notes: 架啦 is a Cantonese sentence-final particle adding emphasis or reassurance.

cantonese: 會諗一啲之前冇點諗過嘅嘢
mandarin_reference: 会想一些之前没怎么想过的事情
notes: 諗=想 means think; 冇點=没怎么 means not really or not much

cantonese: 大陸經濟股市收晒皮
context: commenting on economy and stock market
mandarin_reference: 大陆经济和股市都彻底不行了
notes: 收晒皮 is Cantonese slang meaning completely failed or collapsed

cantonese: 佢懶姐，佢肯開演唱會一定大把人睇
context: commenting on a singer or celebrity
mandarin_reference: 他只是懒而已，他愿意开演唱会的话一定很多人看
notes: 姐 is informal spelling for 啫, meaning only or just; 大把人 means many people.

cantonese: 迫啲居民等唔切就賣樓
mandarin_reference: 逼一些居民等不及就卖房
notes: 啲=一些 means some; 等唔切 means unable to wait any longer.

cantonese: 由DAY 0 開始既10日內有乜野要做一早有晒PLAN
mandarin_reference: 从第0天开始的10天内要做什么，早就已经有完整计划了
notes: DAY 0 and PLAN are English code-mixing; 既 is informal spelling of 嘅; 乜野 means what.

cantonese: 佢年頭已經貼左告示話開
mandarin_reference: 他年初已经贴了告示说会开张
notes: 左 is used for 咗; 話開 here means saying it would open.

cantonese: 話時話我去日本咁多次一次松屋都未食過
mandarin_reference: 说起来，我去日本那么多次，一次松屋都没有吃过
notes: 話時話 means speaking of which; 未食過 means have not eaten before.

cantonese: 如果賣得貴過兩餸飯都唔會幫趁
mandarin_reference: 如果卖得比两餸饭还贵，我也不会光顾
notes: 兩餸飯 is a Hong Kong food term; 幫趁 means to patronize or buy from a shop.

cantonese: 其實有d人會有地址係銀包
mandarin_reference: 其实有些人会把地址放在钱包里
notes: d is informal spelling for 啲; 係 here means in the wallet.

cantonese: 冇人話過拍拖實係拍劇咁甜架喎
mandarin_reference: 没有人说过谈恋爱一定会像拍电视剧那样甜蜜啊
notes: 架喎 marks Cantonese sentence-final tone

cantonese: 做到咁辛苦都叫有糧出
mandarin_reference: 做得这么辛苦，好歹也能拿工资
notes: 有糧出 means receiving wages

cantonese: 我以前試過俾佢地話就算買月票都要拍
mandarin_reference: 我以前试过被他们告知，就算买了月票也要刷卡
notes: 佢地 is an informal spelling for 佢哋; 拍 here refers to tapping a transit card

cantonese: 咁佢仲要應付個正印
mandarin_reference: 那他还要应付正牌伴侣
notes: 正印 is Cantonese slang for the official partner or spouse; requires relationship context

cantonese: 有埋圖個樣應該都認到下嘅
context: commenting on identifying someone from an image
mandarin_reference: 有照片的话，应该还是能认出样子的
notes: 有埋 means also having; 認到下 means being somewhat able to recognize; 嘅 is Cantonese final/possessive particle

cantonese: 當一齊左之後通常就會話你chur得濟
mandarin_reference: 在一起之后，通常就会说你逼得太紧
notes: 左 is used for 咗; chur is Hong Kong online slang meaning to pressure or push someone; 得濟 means too much

cantonese: 又話香港復甦好好景嘅
context: questioning claims about Hong Kong recovery
mandarin_reference: 不是说香港复苏得很好、很景气吗？
notes: 又話 expresses questioning a previous claim; 嘅 adds sentence-final tone

cantonese: 佢一直痴屋企住公屋
context: commenting on housing or family dependence
mandarin_reference: 他一直依赖家里，住在公屋
notes: 痴屋企 means depending on or sticking to family; 公屋=public housing

cantonese: 幾廿歲仲係搵咁少錢
mandarin_reference: 几十岁了还是赚这么少钱
notes: 幾廿歲 means several decades old; 搵錢 means earning money.

cantonese: 比屋企人食晒你份人工?
mandarin_reference: 被家人花光你的工资吗？
notes: 比 is used for 畀; 屋企人=家人 means family; 食晒 means used up or consumed completely; 人工=工资 means salary

cantonese: 人地根本唔會介意你個樣
mandarin_reference: 别人根本不会介意你的长相
notes: 人地 is an informal spelling for 人哋; 唔會=不会; 個樣 means appearance.

cantonese: 我都以為係新式野，原來舊時都有
mandarin_reference: 我也以为是新式东西，原来以前也有
notes: 野 is an informal spelling of 嘢; 舊時 means in the past.

cantonese: 腸粉都要非黑即白，兩隻都好食唔得既
mandarin_reference: 肠粉也要非黑即白吗？两种都好吃不可以吗？
notes: 唔得既 expresses a rhetorical question; 兩隻 means two kinds.

cantonese: 宜家香港麥當勞咁貴
mandarin_reference: 现在香港的麦当劳这么贵
notes: 宜家 is a common informal spelling of 依家, meaning now.

cantonese: 其實出歌一啲都唔貴，派台宣傳先貴
mandarin_reference: 其实出歌一点都不贵，去电台宣传才贵
notes: 派台 is a Hong Kong music industry term for sending a song to radio stations.

cantonese: 今集啲字幕正常返少左個歡樂
context: commenting on subtitles in an episode
mandarin_reference: 这一集的字幕变正常了，反而少了一点乐趣
notes: 左 is used for 咗, 少左 means became less; 正常返 means becoming normal again

cantonese: 佢成日同你攞家用
mandarin_reference: 他总是向你要生活费
notes: 攞家用 means asking for or taking household/living expenses.

cantonese: 想早啲返屋企可以搬老婆出黎
context: joking about using one’s wife as a reason to leave early
mandarin_reference: 想早点回家的时候，可以把老婆拿出来当借口
notes: 出黎 is informal spelling for 出嚟; 搬老婆出黎 means using one’s wife as an excuse in this context.

cantonese: 放工已經好攰只想返屋企但都要應籌佢地
context: complaining about social obligations after work
mandarin_reference: 下班后已经很累，只想回家，但还是要应酬他们
notes: 放工 means getting off work; 攰 means tired; 應酬 means social obligation.

cantonese: 拎完市民錢，即刻拉返個市民
mandarin_reference: 拿完市民的钱，立刻又把那个市民抓回去
notes: 拎 means take; 拉返 means arrest or take back.

cantonese: 原來無咗半年起訴期限，而家先留意到
mandarin_reference: 原来没有了半年的起诉期限，现在才注意到
notes: 先 adds the meaning of only now or only then; 而家 is a common informal spelling of 依家 means now

cantonese: 無咩客都要你搭枱
mandarin_reference: 没什么客人也会要求你拼桌
notes: 搭枱 means sharing a table with other customers.

cantonese: 最大問題一定係租金，見你生意好就加你租
mandarin_reference: 最大的问题一定是租金，看到你生意好就给你增加租金
notes: 加你租 means raising your rent; 見 means seeing or noticing.

cantonese: 仲要結咗婚冇咁易走得甩
mandarin_reference: 而且结了婚，没那么容易脱身
notes: 走得甩 means being able to get away or escape.

cantonese: 講真，幾好睇幾Fun
mandarin_reference: 说真的，很好看很有趣
notes: Fun is English code-mixing; 幾好睇 means quite enjoyable to watch.

cantonese: 公司女同事明明無名指戴左隻戒指都可以話係阿媽送
mandarin_reference: 公司的女同事明明无名指带了个戒指都可以说是妈妈送的
notes: 話係 and 阿媽 are colloquial Cantonese forms; the sentence has a teasing tone.

cantonese: 唔好話條仔玩你感情喎
mandarin_reference: 不要到时说那个男生玩弄你感情喔
notes: 唔好話...喎 gives a warning or reminder tone, not just a literal negation.

cantonese: 既然沒有表態就唔好幻想人地對你有意思啦
mandarin_reference: 既然没有表态就不要幻想别人对你有意思啦
notes: 啦 softens the advice; the sentence mixes Standard Chinese and Cantonese forms.

cantonese: Sor9ry，個人魅力我噴飯
mandarin_reference: 不好意思，所谓个人魅力真是让我笑喷了
notes: Sor9ry is a playful English spelling; the sentence has a sarcastic tone.

cantonese: 我D朋友都好正常唔會咁架
mandarin_reference: 我的朋友都好正常不会这样的啦
notes: D is an informal spelling of 啲; 架 adds explanatory emphasis.

cantonese: 唱歌果個真係好掂
mandarin_reference: 唱歌那位真的好厉害
notes: 好掂 is a Cantonese expression meaning very good or impressive.

cantonese: 最少都有一萬，完全冇難度囉
mandarin_reference: 最少都有一万，完全没有难度咯
notes: 囉 adds a matter-of-fact or obvious tone.

cantonese: 希望黎緊可以多d講吓如何教導中學生理財
mandarin_reference: 希望未来可以多多讲下怎么教中学生理财
notes: 黎緊, 多d, and 講吓 are informal Cantonese written forms.

cantonese: 輕輕鬆鬆傾下計都幾好喎
context: commenting on a casual conversation video
mandarin_reference: 轻轻松松地聊聊天也很好啊
notes: 喎 adds a mild evaluative or reminding tone.

cantonese: 人高又風趣果然係易比人接受D
mandarin_reference: 个子高又风趣，果然比较容易被人接受一点
notes: D is an informal spelling meaning a little more; 比 should be normalized as 被.

cantonese: 媽媽既反應已經算係好俾面㗎啦
mandarin_reference: 妈妈的反应已经算很给面子的啦
notes: 㗎啦 adds emphasis and a concluding tone; 俾面 means to give face.

cantonese: 愈睇愈肚餓
mandarin_reference: 越看越饿
notes: 睇 is a Cantonese verb meaning to watch or look.

cantonese: 但晚上不可以睇e條影片，好肚餓
mandarin_reference: 但是晚上不可以看这条影片，好饿
notes: e條 is an informal online spelling for 呢條; the sentence mixes Standard Chinese and Cantonese.

cantonese: 至少你哋令佢哋成個體驗開心咗
mandarin_reference: 至少你们让他们的整个体验变开心了啊
notes: 你哋, 佢哋, and 咗 are Cantonese written forms.

cantonese: 簡直抵到爛啦，車費都唔止
mandarin_reference: 简直超划算，车费都不止这个价了
notes: 啦 adds emphasis; 抵到爛 is a strong Cantonese expression for being extremely good value.

cantonese: 冇 la la 碌到你哋呢條片, 你哋好好笑呀
mandarin_reference: 莫名其妙刷到你们的这条影片，你们好好笑啊
notes: la la is romanized Cantonese-style spelling; 碌到 means to scroll into or come across a video.

cantonese: 呢排心情不係幾好
mandarin_reference: 这阵子心情不是很好
notes: 呢排 means recently; 不係 is a mixed Standard Chinese/Cantonese form.

cantonese: 最憎就係女仔收兵
mandarin_reference: 最讨厌的就是女生拿别人当备胎
notes: 收兵 is Hong Kong relationship slang for keeping admirers as backup options.

cantonese: 估唔到佢國語ok wor
mandarin_reference: 没想到他的国语还可以喔
notes: ok is English code-mixing; wor adds a surprised or mildly evaluative tone
